title: Retirement Readiness Quiz - Are You on Track to Retire? | CrunchMilk
metaDescription: Find out if you're on track for retirement with this free 8-question quiz. Assess your savings rate, investment strategy, and retirement timeline.
tagline: Are you actually on track to retire when you want?

questions.question: How old are you, and when do you plan to retire?

options.text: I'm over 50 and haven't started saving seriously
I'm 40-50 with moderate savings
I'm 30-45 and saving consistently
I started saving in my 20s and have 15+ years to go

questions.question: What percentage of your income goes into retirement accounts annually?

options.text: Less than 5% or nothing
10-15% (including employer match)
15%+ or maxing out accounts

questions.question: How diversified is your investment portfolio?

options.text: Everything is in one stock or cash
A few individual stocks or one fund
Mix of stocks and bonds across sectors
Diversified across asset classes with regular rebalancing

questions.question: How many times your annual salary have you saved for retirement?

options.text: Less than 1x my salary
1-3x my salary
3-6x my salary
More than 6x my salary

questions.question: Do you know how much income you'll need in retirement?

options.text: I haven't thought about it
I have a rough guess
I've estimated based on current expenses
I've done detailed projections accounting for healthcare and inflation

questions.question: What's your plan for Social Security benefits?

options.text: I'm counting on it as my primary income
I know I'll get something but haven't checked
I've reviewed my statement and factor it as a supplement
I've strategized timing and treat it as a bonus, not a necessity

questions.question: How will you handle healthcare costs between early retirement and Medicare eligibility?

options.text: I haven't considered this at all
I'll figure it out when I get there
I've looked into marketplace plans and costs
I have a specific plan and funds set aside (HSA, etc.)

questions.question: Do you have income sources beyond your primary retirement accounts?

options.text: No, just my 401k/IRA
I have some savings outside retirement accounts
I have 2-3 income sources planned (rental, pension, brokerage)
Multiple diversified income streams with a withdrawal strategy

scoreRanges.label: Behind Schedule
scoreRanges.analysis: You're significantly behind on retirement preparation. The good news is it's never too late to start. Increase your savings rate immediately, even by small amounts, and take advantage of any employer match available.

scoreRanges.label: Catching Up
scoreRanges.analysis: You have some retirement savings going but need to accelerate. Consider increasing contributions by 1-2% each year and review your investment mix to ensure appropriate growth potential.

scoreRanges.label: On Track
scoreRanges.analysis: You're in solid shape for retirement. Fine-tune your strategy by stress-testing your plan against different market scenarios and ensure you have a clear withdrawal strategy.

scoreRanges.label: Retirement Ready
scoreRanges.analysis: Excellent retirement preparation. You've planned thoroughly across savings, diversification, healthcare, and income streams. Keep monitoring and adjusting, but you're well positioned for a secure retirement.
